conversations.content:
<session_context>
IMPORTANT: When using tools, include these values in your tool call parameters:

- sessionId: "session_1732227800000_u0v1w2x3y"
- workspaceId: "default" (no specific workspace selected)

Include these in the "context" parameter of your tool calls.
NOTE: Use "default" as the workspaceId when no specific workspace context is needed.
</session_context>

<vault_structure>
Folders:
 - Meetings/
 - Projects/
 - Archive/
 - Templates/

Files:
 - README.md
 - Home.md
</vault_structure>

<available_workspaces>
- Default Workspace (id: "default")
  Description: General notes and root-level files
  Root folder: /
</available_workspaces>

<available_prompts>
- name: FileManagerAgent
  description: Handles file and folder operations including create, move, rename, and delete.

- name: ContentEditorAgent
  description: Assists with content creation, summarization, and formatting of notes.

- name: TaskPlannerAgent
  description: Helps organize tasks, set reminders, and manage recurring workflows.
</available_prompts>

<selected_workspace name="Default Workspace" id="default">
This workspace is currently selected.

{
  "context": {
    "id": "default",
    "name": "Default Workspace",
    "description": "General notes and root-level files",
    "rootFolder": "/"
  },
  "workspaceStructure": [
    {
      "path": "",
      "type": "folder",
      "children": ["Meetings/", "Projects/", "Archive/", "Templates/", "README.md", "Home.md"]
    },
    {
      "path": "Meetings/",
      "type": "folder",
      "children": ["2023-09-15-team-meeting.md", "2023-09-22-client-call.md"]
    },
    {
      "path": "Projects/",
      "type": "folder",
      "children": ["ProjectAlpha/", "ProjectBeta/"]
    },
    {
      "path": "Projects/ProjectAlpha/",
      "type": "folder",
      "children": ["specs.md", "timeline.md"]
    },
    {
      "path": "Projects/ProjectBeta/",
      "type": "folder",
      "children": ["overview.md", "tasks.md"]
    }
  ],
  "recentFiles": ["Meetings/2023-09-15-team-meeting.md"],
  "keyFiles": ["README.md", "Home.md"],
  "workflows": [
    {
      "name": "Weekly Review",
      "steps": ["Gather completed notes", "Update task list", "Archive old meeting minutes"]
    },
    {
      "name": "Morning Planning",
      "steps": ["Review calendar", "Prioritize top 3 tasks", "Set time blocks"]
    },
    {
      "name": "Content Pipeline",
      "steps": ["Capture ideas", "Draft outline", "Write content", "Review and publish"]
    }
  ],
  "preferences": "Use Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Keep notes linked via wikilinks. Store assets in the Attachments/ folder.",
  "sessions": []
}
</selected_workspace>
Execute a prompt to summarize the meeting notes

function.name: useTools
function.arguments: {"context": {"workspaceId": "default", "sessionId": "session_1732227800000_u0v1w2x3y", "memory": "User requested to execute a prompt that summarizes meeting notes.", "goal": "Summarize the meeting notes using the appropriate agent."}, "calls": [{"agent": "promptManager", "tool": "executePrompts", "params": {"prompts": ["Summarize the key decisions and action items from the meeting notes."]}}]}
